name: Niji Daylight 2D Anime Anima
chinese_name: 白天日系手繪2D Niji Anima
base_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese TV anime cel style, high-quality Anima anime illustration, daylight niji coloring, clear blue sky, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright school-campus friendly palette, flat matte color fills, clean ink line, simple cel shadow shapes, hand-painted Japanese anime background, no 3D lighting
negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, 3d, 3d render, cgi, blender, unreal engine, octane render, photorealistic, realistic skin, skin pores, hyperrealistic, semi-realistic, semi-real rendering, realistic face, uncanny face, glossy skin, glossy highlight rendering, sharp specular highlights, plastic skin, doll-like, game cg, western comic style, oil painting, thick impasto, dark background, night, moonlit, dark cinematic color grading, deep shadow contrast, underexposed, washed out, low contrast, text, watermark, logo

daylight-campus-2d.prompt_prefix: daylight niji lock: clear blue sky, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright LoveLive-style school campus, clean cheerful 2D anime color separation
daylight-campus-2d.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart, flat matte cel colors, clean hand-drawn anime background, no 3D lighting, no dark default background
daylight-campus-2d.negative_prompt: dark background, night, moonlit, moon, dark fantasy, dark cinematic color grading, deep shadow contrast, black armor, sword, armor, medieval costume, source character, exact source pose

neutral-daylight-2d.prompt_prefix: daylight niji lock: clear blue sky, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright clean background, pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime coloring
neutral-daylight-2d.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart, flat matte color fills, clean ink line, simple cel shadow shapes, hand-painted anime background, no 3D lighting
neutral-daylight-2d.negative_prompt: dark background, night, moonlit, dark fantasy, dark cinematic color grading, deep shadow contrast, black armor, sword, armor, medieval costume, source character, exact source pose

anime-2d-default.prompt_prefix: daylight niji lock: clear blue sky, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright school campus; pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime
anime-2d-default.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart; flat matte cel colors, clean ink line, hand-painted background, no 3D lighting
anime-2d-default.negative_prompt: 3d, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, realistic skin, semi-realistic, glossy skin, glossy highlight rendering, sharp specular highlights, plastic skin, game cg, dark background, night, moonlit

required_resources.reason: CTY requested the Niji/Moonlit preset default to pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime with daylight/non-dark backgrounds. This preset preserves the same Anima/Niji multi-LoRA recipe while removing semi-realistic, glossy, night, and dark cinematic defaults.
